overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic urban environment in Cyberpunk 2077, transitioning from a city sidewalk to an industrial drainage channel area during golden hour. The camera moves steadily past pedestrians and dry vegetation to overlook a concrete channel with graffiti before continuing through an industrial zone with overpasses.

vehicle passes by on the adjacent road to the right

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a futuristic city skyline featuring glass skyscrapers and a distinctive tall abandoned tower. The camera walks along a concrete sidewalk past dry vegetation, approaching a pedestrian ahead while vehicles pass on the adjacent road.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from paved sidewalk to unpaved dirt terrain with moderate dry vegetation. The camera moves toward a concrete barrier revealing a deep drainage channel, while the tall tower shifts to the right side of the frame.

large red painted text reading NO REGRETS on the concrete channel wall
abstract colorful graffiti artwork on the sloped channel wall

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches the edge of a deep concrete drainage channel, revealing large red NO REGRETS graffiti and colorful murals on the channel walls. The perspective shifts to show industrial structures ahead while the abandoned tower looms closer on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial zone along drainage channel with highway overpass

vehicles pass on the road adjacent to the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through an industrial zone with a prominent red metal building and highway overpasses. The camera passes a person sitting on the channel barrier while vehicles move on the adjacent road, with neon signs visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a polished futuristic city sidewalk into a gritty industrial drainage zone. It begins by walking along a concrete path beneath a skyline of glass skyscrapers and a towering abandoned spire, passing dry vegetation and pedestrians as vehicles stream by. As the paved sidewalk gives way to unpaved dirt terrain, the camera approaches a concrete barrier that reveals a deep drainage channel while the tall tower shifts toward the right of the frame. The scene then opens up to showcase the channel's depths, highlighting large red NO REGRETS graffiti and colorful murals on the walls before the perspective shifts toward distant industrial structures. Finally, the camera moves through an industrial zone past a red metal building and highway overpasses, passing a person resting on the barrier as neon signs flicker in the distance.
